---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature for Stryx (other than a new rule — use the rule-request template for those)
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

<!-- What problem are you trying to solve? Why does it matter? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What you'd like Stryx to do. Be specific. -->

## Product boundary

<!-- Is this backend/platform security, stack detection, adapters, reporting,
     CI, or docs? React/component quality, accessibility, UI style, and
     generic linting are intentionally out of scope. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you've thought about, including doing nothing. -->

## Use case

<!-- How would you use this? Concrete scenario, not abstract. -->

## Are you willing to help implement?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to take this on
- [ ] Yes, with guidance
- [ ] No, just suggesting

## Additional context

<!-- Links to similar features in other tools, related issues, etc. -->
